chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-692 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on M.A No.8500/2025 (U/A) 2. For order on office objection (s) 3. For order on M.A No.8501/2025 4. For hearing of main case 14.10.2025 Mr.Aziz-ur-Rehman, Advocate for the applicant ********* 1. Granted. 2to4. Counsel for the applicant is aggrieved by the impugned Order dated 25.09.2025 passed by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Shahid Benazir Abad, dismissing the applicant’s cr.misc.app. no.3194/2025 against the proposed accused. The applicant and the proposed accused have long-standing enmity, which has its genesis in an alleged domestic violence incident involving an alleged attempt by the proposed accused no.4 – Muhammad Saleem - to set fire to his wife, Mst Naseeba, who is the applicant’s daughter. Presently, Mst. Naseeba's marriage stands terminated, and the applicant/father and his spouse/mother of Naseeba, have initiated criminal proceedings against the proposed accused no.4. Be that as it may, I have viewed the video clips and photos available on the usb drive which was attached to this application in my chamber, which mandates further hearing. Additionally, Office has raised objections but not attached a copy of the common Order dated 28.08.2025 passed by this Court. Office is directed to place the same in the file as well as secure the usb drive until next hearing date. Issue Notice to the Respondents/proposed accused and Additional P.G. Office for comments. Applicant/complainant to supply usb copy to opponent Counsel and APG. To come up on 28.10.2025 at 9:30am.
Applicant/complainant to supply usb copy to opponent Counsel and APG. To come up on 28.10.2025 at 9:30am. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
